text: Metro Bank signed agreement on January 8 2023 worth $550000 in Nevada

This consulting agreement between TechVault Inc and GreenPath Corp is effective February 1 2024 and terminates February 1 2026 for $1800000 governed by California law

This supply agreement dated December 1 2022 between NovaBuild Corp and AlphaStream Holdings sets the consideration at $2900000 governed by Texas law

This agreement effective April 15 2023 between StarBridge Capital and NightFall Corp for $4400000 under Arizona jurisdiction
